examples: Green tea is also called unfermented tea.
Unlike black tea or oolong, green tea is made from unfermented tea leaves.
If the enzyme activity is caused to stop at a very early stage of tea processing, then substantially unfermented or green tea is the result.
On brew days in the spring and fall, the shack's windows are swung open, unfermented beer is pumped into the tub, left to cool overnight in the breeze and poured into barrels the following morning.
